executives.name: Duncan Craib
executives.background: Mr. Craib is a highly experienced mining executive with over 20 years’ experience in the mining industry. He was previously Finance Director of Swakop Uranium (Pty) Ltd and was involved in the US$2.5 billion development of the Husab Uranium Project in Namibia.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: James Marsh
executives.background: Mr. Marsh is a qualified industrial chemist with over 30 years’ experience in the mining and mineral processing industry. He has held senior positions with several major global companies including Rio Tinto and WMC Resources.

executives.name: Lawrence (Loz) Johnson
executives.background: Mr. Johnson is a geologist with over 25 years’ experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium exploration and development. He has held senior roles with several uranium companies including Paladin Energy.

executives.name: Mathew O'Hara
executives.background: Mr. O'Hara is a Chartered Accountant with over 15 years’ experience in corporate finance, accounting and governance. He has held senior positions with several ASX-listed companies.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Financial Officer and Company Secretary

board_of_directors.name: Wyatt Buck
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Buck is a mining executive with over 35 years’ experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium. He held senior roles at Cameco Corporation, including General Manager of the McArthur River uranium mine.

board_of_directors.name: Duncan Craib
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director and CEO of Boss Energy. Over 20 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Bryn Jones
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Jones is an industrial chemist with over 20 years’ experience in the mining industry, specifically in uranium. He is also a director of several other ASX-listed companies.

board_of_directors.name: Janice (Jan) Honeyman
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Honeyman is a senior mining executive with over 30 years’ experience in the mining industry. She has held senior roles with several major global companies including Rio Tinto and Shell.
